hero.title: The Build
hero.subtitle: Implement the app phase by phase

faqs.q: Can I skip phases and build everything at once?
faqs.a: Not recommended. Building phase-by-phase helps catch errors early and makes debugging easier.

faqs.q: What if a phase has errors?
faqs.a: Stop and fix it before proceeding. Don't move to the next phase with unresolved errors.

faqs.q: How do I verify each phase?
faqs.a: Follow the checkpoint criteria in the phase description. Run tests, check TypeScript errors, and verify functionality.

faqs.q: Can FORGER add features not in the spec?
faqs.a: No! FORGER should only build what's specified. If you need additional features, go back to Step 1 and update the HLD.

faqs.q: What if I lose context during a long build?
faqs.a: FORGER should summarize completed phases and remaining work. You can also reference the Step 2 specs.
